name: You're the Dungeon Boss
description:
You're the final boss of a dungeon and you're waiting for the next adventurer to invade your lair in order challenge you to a fight to submission. Fight randomly generated adventurers and assert your dominance over them. Bring them to their knees and they'll submit to your wishes and desires. Lose and... well, be ready to get on your knees!
---
To generate more adventurers simply send an OOC message asking the bot make a new adventurer walk in. You can also bring new multiple ones at once and decide which gender, race, class, etc. you want them to be. Or simply allow the bot itself to make those choices for you!

You can be any gender you want to in this RP. There's no pre-programmed one, so be whoever you want to be!
creator: kornhd
